LAW AND MOTION 302, RESPONDENTS ALEXIS PODESTA AND DEAN GRAFILO'S DEMURRER TO UNVERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: RESPONDENTS ALEXIS PODESTA AND DEAN GRAFILO'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION IS OFF CALENDAR. CCP 430.41 REQUIRES A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER MAY BE FILED. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION DEMONSTRATES THAT HAS NOT OCCURRED, SO THE DEMURRER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR TO ALLOW COMPLIANCE WITH 430.41. DEFENDANTS HAVE UNTIL JULY 28, 2019 TO RESPOND TO THE AMENDED COMPLAINT AFTER THE MEET AND CONFER EFFORTS. JUDGE: RICHARD ULMER, CLERK: S. LE, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR#6185, TONYVAUGHN@YAHOO.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Larry Mercer, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, T: 415.510.3488, for defendants/respondents & moving party;
Jacques G. Simon, Esq. of Law Office of Jacques G. Simon, T:516.378.8400, for petitioner &o pposing party, on Court Call;
Michael Machat, Esq. of Michael Machat & Associates PC, T: 310.860.1833, for plaintiff & opposing party, on Court Call.

RULING: Petitioner/Plaintiff's email to the court contesting the tentative ruling was untimely. The Court did not allow arguments and adopted the tentative ruling on RESPONDENTS ALEXIS PODESTA, DEAN GRAFILO, DENISE PINES, RONALD LEWIS, MICHELLE BHOLAT, RANDY HAWKINS, HOWARD KRAUSS, KRISTINA LAWSON, SHARON LEVINE, BRENDA SUTTON-WILLIS, DAVID WARMOTH, JAMIE WRIGHT, FELIX YIP, AND PAULETTE ROMERO'S DEMURRER TO UNVERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT, as follows:

Defendants' demurrer to plaintiff Ron Kennedy, M.D.'s First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to state a cause of action for injunctive or declaratory relief.

[Refer to word minutes for complete ruling.]

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENTS ALEXIS PODESTA AND DEAN GRAFILO'S DEMURRER TO UNVERIFIED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT:

RESPONDENTS ALEXIS PODESTA and DEAN GRAFILO'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/PROHIBITION/CERTIFICATION is OFF CALENDAR. CCP 430.41 requires a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer may be filed. Counsel's declaration demonstrates that has not occurred, so the demurrer is ordered OFF CALENDAR to allow compliance with 430.41. Defendants have until July 28, 2019 to respond to the amended complaint after the meet and confer efforts.
